title: stevia salicifolia
intro: Stevia salicifolia, also known as Brazilian stevia or false stevia, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, such as fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Stevia salicifolia can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine, particularly in South America.
